shots.title: PROP PLATE — 2027 Sleek Open-Cockpit Recumbent Bike — 2026-06-17 02:07 PT
shots.note: CURRENT REVIEW LOCK CANDIDATE. Deterministic prop plate for the bike model before generating more character shots. One bike geometry is duplicated and the bike-only geometry is mirrored to show the opposite side. Bike A and Bike B stay parallel and face the same physical direction. Final character shots must preserve this same sleek 2027 upscale Equinox/Newport Beach recumbent bike: black satin frame, subtle champagne trim, open cockpit, low compact touchscreen on a short integrated stem, side/base handles, reclined seat/backrest, vented flywheel housing, foot straps, and logical crank/pedal path. No bulky upright handlebars, no 1990s gym equipment, no floating screens, no crossed feet, no missing pedals, and no bike style changes between Camera A and Camera B.
